record.field: Template for staffing engagements. Clone this project when a Staffing deal (P1) is marked Closed Won. Tasks cover the full placement lifecycle.
- Review job description with client - Confirm required skills, certifications, clearance level - Set target start date and contract duration - Define interview process and timeline
- Source candidates from bench and external networks - Conduct initial phone screens - Verify qualifications and availability - Prepare shortlist of 3-5 candidates
- Submit candidate profiles to client - Schedule and coordinate interviews - Collect client feedback after each round - Manage candidate communication
- Negotiate offer terms with candidate and client - Process background check and onboarding paperwork - Confirm start date and logistics - Set up billing in Odoo Sales
- Ensure resource has all access and equipment - Conduct Day 1 check-in with client and resource - Schedule weekly check-ins for first month - Set up timesheet tracking in Odoo
Template for consulting engagements. Clone this project when a Consulting deal (P2) is marked Closed Won. Tasks follow the delivery lifecycle from architecture through handover.
- Review SOW deliverables and acceptance criteria - Design technical architecture and solution approach - Create project timeline and milestones - Set up project collaboration tools and access
- Provision cloud infrastructure per architecture design - Configure networking, security groups, IAM - Set up CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation - Document infrastructure setup procedures
- Execute migration or implementation plan - Perform data migration and validation - Configure application services and integrations - Daily progress tracking and blockers resolution
- Execute UAT test plan with client - Performance and load testing - Security review and vulnerability assessment - Fix defects and re-validate

- Create operations runbook and documentation - Conduct knowledge transfer sessions with client team - Provide training on new systems and processes - Formal project sign-off and warranty period kickoff
Template for managed service engagements. Clone this project when a Managed Services deal (P4) is marked Active Service. Tasks cover the service lifecycle.
- Define service scope and boundaries - Set SLA targets (uptime, response time, resolution time) - Identify monitoring and alerting requirements - Create escalation matrix
- Gain access to client infrastructure - Set up monitoring and alerting tools - Document current state of all managed systems - Introduce dedicated support team to client
- Configure monitoring dashboards - Set up automated alerting and incident creation - Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures - Verify all SLA measurement tools are operational
- Transition to managed operations - Begin SLA tracking and reporting - Establish regular operational review cadence - Monthly service reports to client
- Quarterly business review with client - Identify optimization opportunities - Prepare renewal proposal (60 days before expiry) - Plan scope adjustments for next contract period
